details: Beginning pipeline run analysis for layer_norm_rm run2
Building timeline from breadcrumbs and git commits. Noted kernel-writer breadcrumb timestamp anomalies for stages 2-5.

All evidence gathered. Building self-reflection report. Key findings: 1 hard attempt (reduce_mean numerical mismatch), clean 4/5 stage first-pass, kernel-writer breadcrumb timestamps unreliable for stages 2-5, builder had include path issue, architect produced high-quality design doc.

Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 3 new pipeline improvements added (#12, #13, #14). Key findings: 4/5 TDD stages first-pass, reduce_w reference switch was major improvement, analyzer parallelization is biggest easy win.
